'''Gormer''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Neo-Crusader]] who served under the command of [[Cassus Fett]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. He had a [[Gormer's son|son]]. He was killed by [[Raana Tey]] at the [[Jedi Tower]] during the [[Taris Siege|Siege of Taris]].

{{Char-stub}}
